description: Create a pneumatic circuit diagram for a clamp system. The circuit must include an Air Source, an FRL Unit, a 3/2-Way Solenoid Valve (Spring Return), and a Single Acting Cylinder (Spring Return) connected in sequence (Source to FRL to Valve to Cylinder). Apply the following labels to the components: "Main Air (6 bar)" for the Source, "FRL-01" for the FRL, "SOL-A" for the Valve, and "Clamp Cyl" for the Cylinder. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/pneumatic_clamp_circuit.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Documents/pneumatic_clamp_circuit.png.
